create().details: Reverts if the caller already has a deployed payroll.

allPayrolls(uint256).notice: Ordered list of all payroll contracts ever created.

create().notice: Deploy a fresh ConfidentialPayroll for the caller.

userPayroll(address).notice: Returns the payroll contract deployed by a given employer address.

userdoc.notice: Anyone can call create() to deploy their own ConfidentialPayroll         instance. One deployment per wallet address.         The factory is deployed with the cUSDC and cUSDT wrapper addresses         so every payroll contract it creates supports all three salary tokens.
